notes:
Details
Event by Wynton Alan Huddle, Hunter Root and 4 others
Tellus 360
Friends  · Wynton Alan Huddle's friends on Facebook
Seeds second show ever thanks to the Vonderful Districts. Think of it like an early Christmas present! Let us gather and dine in delicious jams!
Address: 24 East King st, Lancaster PA
Buy tickets here for 5 dollars : http://www.tellus360.com/.../tellus360-presents-the.../
You could also pay at the door, but it's a bit more risky if the show ends up selling out.
Seeds: http://www.facebook.com/seedslancaster?fref=ts
The Districts: http://www.facebook.com/thedistrictsband?fref=ts

See less
Lancaster, Pennsylvania
